title: Travel Planning Papercraft Map Tabletop AI
sourceTitle: Travel Planning Papercraft Map Tabletop AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium travel-planning papercraft map tabletop for Kyoto, turning itinerary research into a miniature mixed-media destination diorama. Subject: A detailed map of Kyoto lies on a warm wooden desk while handcrafted papercraft Kiyomizu-dera, Fushimi Inari torii gates, bamboo grove, Gion lantern street, and tiny matcha tea house rise from the map in approximate geographic positions. Scene: Travel-planning desk scene with black desk lamp, train ticket, washi tape, pencil, and small ceramic cup, notebook itinerary, postcards, camera, passport, travel books, local souvenirs, and a smartphone showing a readable Kyoto eSIM travel connectivity screen. Composition: Slightly elevated tabletop view: map fills the center, papercraft landmarks create layered depth, a dotted red route tells a three-day cultural walk from shrine gates to old town streets, and a tiny traveler with backpack and rolling suitcase is mid-journey between destinations. Signature Elements: Preserved travel planning papercraft map tabletop source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Lighting Mood: warm cozy black desk-lamp glow with soft evening shadows. Style: Mixed-media papercraft diorama with intricate layered paper architecture, miniature terrain, realistic desk objects, editorial travel photography, Pinterest-ready premium commercial advertising finish. Color Palette: Warm wood, cream map paper, destination-specific accent colors, red dotted route, soft lamp glow, realistic travel-object neutrals, and refined handmade paper tones. Lighting: A premium travel-planning tabletop scene for LOCATION, photographed from a slightly elevated angle. with shallow depth of field, crisp map detail, soft shadows under paper landmarks, and cinematic tabletop atmosphere. Materials: Layered paper terrain, folded papercraft landmarks, map paper, wood desk, phone glass, notebook paper, postcards, camera surfaces, passport cover, and miniature souvenir textures. Typography: The smartphone screen includes readable Kyoto eSIM text; map labels stay small and plausible without cluttering the visual story. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
